strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows
Strong background in full-stack development and multiple programming languages
Experience with event-driven systems and microservices architecture
concerns: Lack of direct experience in fintech infrastructure and regulated environments
No clear evidence of experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ people
Limited visibility into leadership and governance experience
response.justification: The candidate has relevant technical expertise and experience with AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct experience in fintech and scaling large engineering teams.
